title: Lam Research: Harnessing Semiconductor Growth
text: LRCX's market position in the semiconductor supply chain is like selling shovels in a gold rush. The company's sales are closely tied to the growing global semiconductor capex. The current market slowdown is temporary, caused by high inventories subsequent to a period of rapid capacity growth. The supply/demand balance is expected to recalibrate as early as 2024.

title: These stocks delivered biggest shareholder returns in last decade
text: The ever-changing technology industry saw semiconductor companies emerge as pivotal players, steering the trajectory of progress over the past decade.

title: Lam Research: Upgrade To Buy, WFE Spend Rebound Timed For 2024
text: We are upgrading Lam Research stock back to a buy. We are now less concerned about the high exposure to the Chinese domestic customers as we expect non-Chinese leading-edge WFE spend to rebound in 2024. We expect the WFE for the memory market to rebound next year as DRAM and NAND bit shipments are already rebounding.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio: Year One Is On The Books
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 3.07% in October, underperforming the S&P 500 by 0.97%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 3.61%.
